#  Link Bank Accounts to Procore Pay 
#####  General Availability in Select Markets (United States)
![Flag Us](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/eb8f21ce49403a47d7bb5a0cedc7e0e9/7c0ec0977e654cc6bc9f3d8efa80fbe3/flag-us.png?fm=webp&h=14) [Procore Pay ](https://www.procore.com/pay) is available in the United States. It is designed for General Contractors and Owner-Builders who act as their own General Contractors on a job. Procore Pay extends the [Invoice Management](https://www.procore.com/invoice-management) functionality in the Procore web application to handle the payment process between general and specialty contractors.
### What is your role?
When using Procore Pay to send or receive payments, a Payments Admin (for paid Procore accounts) or a System Admin (for free Procore accounts) can link a bank account to Procore Pay. The steps you use depend on your role in the payment process. Identity verification for Procore Pay is done using a commercially available database/registry of bank account information.
[I am the payor:](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/about-the-payment-processing-tab-in-the-payments-tool/add-funding-accounts)
[I am the payee:](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payee-setup-guide/add-your-bank-account)

title: Link Bank Accounts to Procore Pay
description: How to link external bank accounts to Procore Pay from the payor and payee environments.
